BatchSize          1000000 # Indexer batch size; bounds peak RAM
MinIntensity       50.0 # (May be deprecated by threshold methods)
MinGoodSpots       3 # Min unique spots to keep orientation
RobustFilter       1 # 1=twin/CSL-aware filter (keep Sigma3 twins), 0=legacy unique-spot only
ThresholdMethod     adaptive # options: adaptive, otsu, fixed, percentile
Threshold           0.0 # Used only if ThresholdMethod is 'fixed'
ThresholdPercentile 90.0 # Used only if ThresholdMethod is 'percentile'
ForwardFile        /dev/shm/Simulated_FwdSim_NiIndent.bin # Output from executable forward sim?
DoFwd              0 # Enable forward sim in executable?
